name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Shortcut (lnk) File Executing a Critical Process (1)
notes:
This Building Block detects critical processes created from shortcut (lnk) files, in order by QRadar rules. 

Events may be received in wrong order, thus 2 building blocks are required.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shorcut (lnk) File

BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Executing Commands match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 15 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shorcut (lnk) File match
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Shortcut (lnk) File Executing a Critical Process (1) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Executing Commands match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 15 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shorcut (lnk) File match
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Executing Commands match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 15 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shorcut (lnk) File match
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Shortcut (lnk) File Executing a Critical Process (1) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Executing Commands match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 15 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shorcut (lnk) File match
